summary: Frontend testing of Kanban board scroll improvements - Left/Right scroll buttons and auto-scroll during drag. All features working correctly.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - does not affect functionality (same as iteration_13)

passed_tests: Right scroll button scrolls board right by 300px on click
Left scroll button scrolls board left by 300px on click
Scroll buttons have proper hover effects (hover:scale-110 and hover:bg-white)
All 11 status columns present: new, contacted, qualified, in_progress, trial_in_progress, proposal_shared, proposal_approved_by_customer, won, lost, not_qualified, future_followup
Auto-scroll code is present (startAutoScroll, stopAutoScroll, handleContainerDragOver functions)
Auto-scroll triggers at 100px from left/right edges during drag
Auto-scroll stops on dragLeave and dragEnd events
Can scroll to far-right columns (Won, Lost) using scroll buttons
Drag-drop from New to Contacted triggers Activity Log dialog
Activity Log dialog shows correct from/to status badges
Activity Log dialog has all 6 interaction methods (Call, Visit, Email, WhatsApp, SMS, Other)
Activity Log dialog has description textarea and submit button
Cancel button closes Activity Log dialog without status change
critical_code_review_comments: Scroll button implementation is clean with proper data-testid attributes
Cleanup effect present to clear auto-scroll interval on unmount
Edge detection zone (100px) is reasonable for drag-scroll functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kanban board scroll improvements fully tested. Scroll buttons (left/right arrows) work correctly. Auto-scroll during drag is implemented via handleContainerDragOver - triggers when mouse is within 100px of board edges. Activity Log dialog appears after drag-drop status changes. All 11 columns present and scrollable.
